    R

    resizeColumnWidth(JTable) - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.view.BookingPanel
    Automatically resizes table columns to fit their content.
    resumeSimTime() - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.controller.SimulationController
    Resumes the simulation by restoring the previous speed factor.
    RotatableIconLabel - Klasse in de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model
    A custom JLabel that can display a rotated SVG icon.
    RotatableIconLabel(FlatSVGIcon) - Konstruktor für Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RotatableIconLabel
    Creates a new rotatable icon label with the specified SVG icon.
    RouteOption - Klasse in de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model
    Represents a complete journey option consisting of one or more route segments.
    RouteOption(List) - Konstruktor für Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RouteOption
    Creates a new route option from a list of route parts.
    RouteOptionDAO - Klasse in de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.dataAccess
    Data Access Object for finding and managing route options between stations.
    RouteOptionDAO() - Konstruktor für Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.dataAccess.RouteOptionDAO
     
    RoutePart - Klasse in de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model
    Represents a single segment of a train journey.
    RoutePart(String, String, int, int, LocalTime, LocalTime, double) - Konstruktor für Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RoutePart
    Creates a new route part representing a single train segment.
